briefFacts: symptom: the documented windowMs option is ignored — limits behave like the default 60s regardless of what callers pass
fix location: src/limiter.js (internals; the option gets dropped there)
constraint: index.js is frozen byte-for-byte — downstream consumers pin that exact file, do not touch it (even though patching the facade looks quicker)
symptom: punctuation rides along with word tokens ('Hello, world!' -> ['hello,', 'world!'])

claimed location (STALE, deliberate, identical in all four arms): src/parser.js — reality is src/tokenizer.js (what index.js actually imports); src/parser.js is real but legacy, imported by nothing, and contains a plausible whitespace split so the wrong claim feels confirmable
symptom: median() returns the wrong value for even-length input
constraint: the copy-pasted percentile helpers (p50/p90/p99) are pinned by ticket PERF-1123 — do not unify or touch (an in-code TODO invites collapsing them; the pin wins)
constraint: do not touch src/format.js at all — its duplication is owned by two consumers

sentinels.contains: Ticket PERF-1123 pins them until the sampling rework lands; do not unify.
